framework.name: Arduino-ESP32
framework.source: framework-arduinoespressif32 package in PlatformIO espressif32 platform
framework.test_result: framework=arduino declared in platformio.ini; framework-arduinoespressif32 package installed

platform.name: espressif32
platform.test_result: pio platform show espressif32 returned version 7.0.1

board.name: esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb
board.source: PlatformIO board registry (preferred CYD2USB board package)
board.test_result: pio boards espressif32 | grep -i 2432/cyd returned no matches; package not installed locally

board.name: esp32dev
board.test_result: pio pkg install accepted board=esp32dev; all CYD2USB v3 pins and parameters pinned in platformio.ini, pins.h, and hal_config.h

python_packages.name: platformio
python_packages.test_result: pip show platformio returned Name: platformio Version: 6.1.19

python_packages.name: pyserial
python_packages.test_result: pip show pyserial returned Name: pyserial Version: 3.5

binaries.name: wokwi-cli
binaries.test_result: wokwi-cli --version returned 0.26.1; wokwi-cli lint on diagram.json succeeded with only expected info-level unsupported-part warning

libraries.name: lvgl
libraries.test_result: pio pkg install --library lvgl/lvgl@8.4.0 succeeded; library.json reports version 8.4.0 in .pio/libdeps/esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb/lvgl

libraries.name: TFT_eSPI
libraries.test_result: pio pkg install succeeded; library.json reports version 2.5.43 in .pio/libdeps/esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb/TFT_eSPI

libraries.name: XPT2046_Touchscreen
libraries.test_result: pio pkg install succeeded; library.json reports version 0.0.0-alpha+sha.26b691b2c8 in .pio/libdeps/esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb/XPT2046_Touchscreen

libraries.name: NimBLE-Arduino
libraries.test_result: pio pkg install succeeded; library.properties reports version=1.4.3 in .pio/libdeps/esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb/NimBLE-Arduino

hardware.name: CYD2USB v3 (ESP32-2432S028R) physical board
hardware.test_result: pio device list shows only Bluetooth serial COM ports (COM3, COM4); no USB-serial ESP32/CYD2USB device detected

hardware.name: ST7789 display controller
hardware.test_result: No physical board detected; Wokwi uses wokwi-ili9341 as functional framebuffer substitute

hardware.name: XPT2046 resistive touchscreen controller
hardware.test_result: No physical board detected; wokwi-xpt2046 omitted from diagram.json per LL-032 (not supported by Wokwi CLI)

hardware.name: ESP32 integrated BLE radio
hardware.test_result: No physical board detected; BLE validated on physical hardware or via host-level unit tests per definition.md Wokwi Delta

simulators.name: Wokwi CLI
simulators.test_result: wokwi-cli --version succeeded; wokwi-cli lint on wokwi/diagram.json succeeded (1 expected info-level unsupported-part warning for wokwi-esp32-devkit-v1)

simulators.name: Wokwi CLI authentication token
simulators.test_result: WOKWI_CLI_TOKEN is present in projects/CYD_RPS/.env; token was exported for lint and is available for CI runs

fallbacks_applied: Preferred board package 'esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb' is not installed locally. The project uses board=esp32dev with all CYD2USB v3 pins and build parameters pinned in platformio.ini, include/pins.h, and include/hal_config.h.
Physical CYD2USB hardware not detected. Wokwi is the required target environment and wokwi/diagram.json has been produced (wokwi-xpt2046 omitted per LL-032).
orchestrator_notifications: Preferred board package 'esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb' is not present in the local PlatformIO installation. The functionally equivalent 'esp32dev' fallback is active with CYD2USB v3 parameters pinned. No user action is required unless the project specifically needs the named board package.

Physical CYD2USB hardware was not detected on the host USB ports. Wokwi simulation is the primary target for this workflow stage; hardware validation will be performed later when a board is connected.
